cards.front: What is the test of significance for means of two small samples
cards.back: Two-sample t-test or Mann-Whitney U test, depending on the type of data

cards.front: What is the null hypothesis for the two-sample t-test
cards.back: The means of the two samples are equal (μ1 = μ2)

cards.front: What is the alternative hypothesis for the two-sample t-test
cards.back: The means of the two samples are not equal (μ1 ≠ μ2)

cards.front: How is the two-sample t-test calculated
What is the significance level (α) for the two-sample t-test
cards.back: Typically set to 0.05, the probability of rejecting the null hypothesis when it is true
